title: AM I? — documentary on consciousness
summary: Feature-length documentary on consciousness, used here as a way into questions about machine consciousness and moral status.

title: On the Dangers of Stochastic Parrots: Can Language Models Be Too Big?
summary: Foundational critique of large language models — environmental, social, and epistemic costs of building ever-bigger systems. A starting point for ethical thinking about LLMs.

title: AI Wellbeing
summary: Hub for research and resources on the moral status and welfare of AI systems.

title: Kyle Fish on the most bizarre findings from 5 AI welfare experiments
summary: Interview with Anthropic's AI welfare researcher on what experiments are showing about model wellbeing — concrete, surprising, and a good intro to the field.

title: Eleos AI
summary: Research organisation focused on AI moral status and welfare. A good place to read about open questions in the space.
